summary: G.2.2A Pricing Settings + Bulk Recalc Testing Complete - 14/14 backend tests passed (100%), all frontend UI tests passed. Verified pricing_settings persistence, recalc dry_run/apply, preview-display-prices, role-based access (super_admin only), and all PricingSettingsTab UI elements.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend: PUT /api/admin/projects/{id} correctly accepts pricing_settings dict and persists base_price_per_sqm, vat_rate, floor_corrections, type_overrides

Backend: POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/pricing/recalc with dry_run=true returns BulkRecalcResult with 52 items including code, property_type, floor, area_total, old_list_price, new_list_price, delta, used_pricing_source, skipped, skip_reason
Backend: POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/pricing/recalc with dry_run=false applies updates to db.properties.list_price + base_price
Backend: GET /api/admin/projects/{id}/pricing/preview-display-prices returns rows with list_price and display_price_with_vat (= list_price × (1+vat_rate/100))
Backend: All 3 pricing endpoints correctly reject sales role with 403 and anonymous with 401
Backend: Pricing engine resolution priority working: manual_override → type_override → floor_correction → base
Frontend: PricingSettingsTab visible only for super_admin in edit mode (mode='edit' && editingId && isSuperAdmin)
Frontend: PricingSettingsTab NOT visible for sales role (correct)
Frontend: PricingSettingsTab NOT visible in create mode (Нов проект) (correct)

Frontend: All data-testid attributes present and working: pricing-settings-tab, pricing-base-ppm, pricing-vat-rate, pricing-load-defaults, pricing-save, pricing-preview-recalc, add-floor-correction, add-type-override, floor-correction-floor-{idx}, floor-correction-ppm-{idx}, floor-correction-remove-{idx}, type-override-type-{idx}, type-override-ppm-{idx}, type-override-remove-{idx}, pricing-recalc-dialog, recalc-total-count, recalc-updated-count, recalc-skipped-count, pricing-apply-recalc
Frontend: 'Default Хаджи Димитър' button loads HADZHI_DIMITAR_DEFAULTS (6 floor_corrections + 5 type_overrides) with confirm dialog
Frontend: Add/remove rows in floor_corrections and type_overrides working correctly
Frontend: 'Запази настройките' button PUTs payload and shows success toast
Frontend: 'Преглед на recalc' opens dialog with counters (52 total, 52 updated, 0 skipped) and table
Frontend: 'Приложи recalc' applies changes and shows 'Updated 52 имота' toast
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Used existing Хаджи Димитър project (ID: 530a81a9-0b56-4b9b-a447-47170ff29cc2) with 52 properties.
context_for_next_testing_agent: G.2.2A pricing settings fully tested. Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_pricing_g22a.py covers: PUT pricing_settings persistence, recalc dry_run returns BulkRecalcResult, recalc without settings returns 400, recalc apply updates DB, preview-display-prices returns VAT-inclusive prices, role-based access (super_admin only, sales 403, anonymous 401), non-existent project 404. Frontend verified: PricingSettingsTab visible only for super_admin in edit mode, all testids present, load defaults button, add/remove floor corrections and type overrides, save button, preview recalc dialog with counters and table, apply recalc button.
verified_features: Backend: PUT /api/admin/projects/{id} accepts pricing_settings dict and persists
Backend: POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/pricing/recalc with dry_run=true returns BulkRecalcResult
Backend: POST /api/admin/projects/{id}/pricing/recalc with dry_run=false applies updates
Backend: All pricing endpoints reject sales role with 403
Backend: All pricing endpoints reject anonymous with 401
Frontend: super_admin sees pricing-settings-tab in edit mode
Frontend: sales role does NOT see pricing-settings-tab
Frontend: create mode does NOT show pricing-settings-tab
Frontend: pricing-load-defaults button loads HADZHI_DIMITAR_DEFAULTS with confirm
Frontend: add-floor-correction and add-type-override buttons work
Frontend: floor-correction-remove-{idx} and type-override-remove-{idx} buttons work
Frontend: pricing-save button PUTs and shows success toast
Frontend: pricing-preview-recalc opens dialog with counters and table
Frontend: pricing-apply-recalc applies changes and shows success toast
